title: Personalized Family Name Sign – Custom Wooden Laser Engraved Home Decor, 12x8 Inch
metaTitle: Custom Family Name Wooden Sign – Laser Engraved Home Decor
metaDescription: Personalize your home with our custom family name wooden sign. Laser engraved on natural basswood. 12x8 inches. $35. Order now for a heartfelt gift!
shortDescription: A custom laser-engraved wooden family name sign, crafted from natural basswood. Perfect for personalized home decor.
fullDescription:
**Welcome Your Family Home with a Touch of Warmth**

Your home is more than just a place—it’s where memories are made. Our Personalized Family Name Sign transforms a simple wooden plaque into a cherished keepsake that celebrates your unique story. Whether displayed above the front door, in the living room, or as a wedding gift, this sign adds a timeless, rustic charm to any space.

**Customization Made Simple**

We laser engrave your chosen family name onto premium natural basswood, using a non-toxic finish that’s safe for indoor use. The result is a crisp, elegant design that will last for years. Simply provide your family name at checkout, and we’ll handle the rest. Each sign is carefully handcrafted to ensure every detail shines.

**Product Specifications**
- **Material:** Natural basswood with non-toxic finish
- **Size:** 12 x 8 inches (perfect for walls, mantels, or entryways)
- **Production Time:** 5-7 business days
- **Customization:** Laser engraved family name (text only)
- **Price:** $35

**Perfect for Every Occasion**

This custom wooden sign makes an unforgettable gift for housewarmings, anniversaries, holidays, or new parents. It’s also a beautiful way to brand your family’s space, creating a focal point that guests will admire. Pair it with other personalized decor for a cohesive look.

**Why Choose Us?**
- Eco-friendly materials
- Handcrafted with care
- Fast production and reliable shipping
- Satisfaction guaranteed

Add your family name to cart today and let your home tell your story.
altTags: Personalized family name wooden sign on wall
Custom laser engraved basswood sign 12x8 inches
Rustic home decor with family name engraved
faq: How do I customize the family name on the sign? Simply enter the desired family name in the customization box during checkout. We’ll engrave it exactly as provided.
What is the production time for this sign? Production takes 5-7 business days, plus shipping time. We’ll notify you once it’s on its way.
Is the wood finish safe for homes with children or pets? Yes, the sign uses a non-toxic finish that is safe for indoor use and meets safety standards.
